build.beforeDevCommand: npm run sync-version && npm run dev

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com; media-src 'self' data: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' data: blob: ws: wss: http://localhost:* https://api.github.com asset: http://asset.localhost ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'
